'''Gandrun Two''' was a [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] that occupied the second [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position<ref name="GG2-2" /> in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies']] [[Gandrun system/Legends|Gandrun system]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Its terrain was dominated by endless sand dunes.<ref name="GG2-2" />

==Behind the scenes==
Gandrun Two was introduced in ''[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin]]'', a [[1989]] sourcebook published by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="GG2">''[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin]]''</ref> The [[StarWars.com]] [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|Online Companion]] to the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Gandrun system, and therefore Gandrun Two, in grid square J-13.<ref name="EAOC" />
